meaning: n.滋味,气味,食欲,特定的味道或气味,一种有特色的性质vi.有...的滋味,有...气味vt.加调味品于,使有风味,尝到或闻到,尽情享受
examples: Savor the silence, if that's what nature serves up, or thrill to the tap-tap of the woodpecker.
As the solarise chromatic over the horizon, I went out to savor the loveliness of the grassland landscape.
Savor the joy of simple pleasures.
You don't have to be a molecular cuisine genius to savor the experience here.
Bonus: they are also super short, all the better to savor every delicious word.
